---
title: "04 playground"
output: html_document
---

```{r}

```


# TEL

## max mod troubleshoot

```{r}
# singular fit
m1 <- lmer(
  TestScore ~ Delay * Group + 
    (1 + Delay | Subject_ID) +
    (1 + Delay * Group | Test_word),
  data = tel
)

# singular fit
m2 <- lmer(
  TestScore ~ Delay * Group + 
    (1 + Delay | Subject_ID) +
    (1 + Delay + Group | Test_word),
  data = tel
)

# no singular fit!
m3 <- lmer(
  TestScore ~ Delay * Group + 
    (1 + Delay | Subject_ID) +
    (1 + Delay | Test_word),
  data = tel
)

summary(m3)
```
